title: rcpt configuration
description: Proof obligations for a repository: the checks a coding agent's work must pass before 'done' means done.

checks.description: Named commands that must exit 0. Each is a proof: tests pass, build compiles, lint is clean.

run.description: Shell command to run, e.g. "npm test".

cwd.description: Working directory relative to the repo root. Defaults to ".".

timeoutSeconds.description: Kill the check after this many seconds. Defaults to 600.

gate.description: Check names the agent stop-gate (`rcpt gate`) runs. Defaults to all checks.

gateMaxBlocks.description: How many times per session the stop-gate may send the agent back before letting go. Default 3.

testGlobs.description: Globs treated as test files when flagging suspicious edits in agent transcripts.
